description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectilinear floor plan, featuring large windows and a transparent section that reveals the interior layout. The exterior is clad in a combination of wood and white materials, giving it a contemporary appearance. A winding stone pathway leads from the house entrance through a landscaped garden with several trees and shrubs, adding a natural touch to the urban setting. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the transparent roof, and a prominent main entryway. The landscaping is organized with circular patches of grass and flowering trees, enhancing curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes openness, clean lines, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped garden with a winding path and trees. The exterior features wood and white finishes, and the interior layout is visible through a transparent roof section.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entryway, winding path, and landscaped garden with several trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, wood paneling, and the continuation of the garden path and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more of the interior layout, and the garden path curving away from the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, the transparent roof, and the full extent of the garden path and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and a winding stone path leading through landscaped garden areas.
